Package sailpoint.api.nativeidentitychange

Class GroupNativeIdentityChangeIdentityPropagator

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.api.nativeidentitychange.AbstractNativeIdentityChangePropagator
      • sailpoint.api.nativeidentitychange.GroupNativeIdentityChangeIdentityPropagator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NativeIdentityChangePropagator
    public class GroupNativeIdentityChangeIdentityPropagator
extends AbstractNativeIdentityChangePropagator
    This will propagate group type native identity change to Identity object by creating 'Identity Refresh Partition' Request for all group members.

      boolean processEvents​(SailPointContext context, java.util.List<NativeIdentityChangeEvent> changeEvents, TaskResult result)

    • Method Detail

      • processEvents

        public boolean processEvents​(SailPointContext context,
                             java.util.List<NativeIdentityChangeEvent> changeEvents,
                             TaskResult result)
                      throws GeneralException
        Description copied from interface: NativeIdentityChangePropagator
        Processes the list of NativeIdentityChangeEvents. Typically this entails renaming every instance of old native identity strings (NativeIdentityChangeEvent.getOldNativeIdentity()) to new native identity strings (NativeIdentityChangeEvent.getNewNativeIdentity()) in a set of objects of interest, although custom subclasses can do pretty much anything. Implementations will have to supply this method.
        Parameters:
        context - The SailPointContext
        changeEvents - The list of NativeIdentityChangeEvents to process
        result - The TaskResult
        Returns:
        true If the entire list of events was processed successfully
        Throws:
        GeneralException - is treated by NativeIdentityChangePropagationRequestExecutor as if it were a permanent exception.
        sailpoint.request.RequestTemporaryException - for conditions where it is known to be possible to retry the request.
        sailpoint.request.RequestPermanentException - for conditions where it is known that a retry would not lead to a better outcome.
